title: Codebeamer: Fundamentals of Requirements Management
description: Gain proficiency in Codebeamer to record, refine, trace, and link requirements using techniques including mass edit, Microsoft Office integration, views, reports, and filters.

modules.title: Introduction to Requirements Management
modules.description: Explore the Codebeamer requirements management framework, examine common categories and user roles, and understand the gather-record-trace-develop lifecycle.

modules.title: Record Requirements
modules.description: Input requirements from various sources, understand Codebeamer relationships, assign requirements, and manage tracker status transitions.

modules.title: Refine and Prioritize Requirements
modules.description: Copy tracker items using the library, edit items with Excel round-trip, define associations, and add upstream references.

modules.title: Trace Requirements
modules.description: Use traceability reports to verify requirement coverage, examine suspected items, and clear suspected badges manually and in bulk.
